_comment: Dynamic task-type registry (FIX-325). Source of truth for classifier enum, system prompt, cc_json_schema, model routing, wiki folders, and regex fast-path. To add a type: append here, set MODEL_<UPPER> in .env if needed, optionally create data/wiki/fragments/<wiki_folder>/. For soft types (status=soft), run scripts/optimize_prompts.py --target classifier to promote into compiled DSPy classifier.

default.description: everything else (read, write, create, delete, move, standard tasks)

preject.description: calendar invites, sync to external CRM/service, upload to external URL

knowledge_aspects.prompt: Proven step sequences leading to OUTCOME_OK, especially contact lookup then outbox write patterns
Risks and failure patterns, especially wrong-recipient errors and skipped contact file reads
Email-specific optimizations and lookup shortcuts

queue.description: work through / take care of / handle the incoming queue or all inbox items

knowledge_aspects.prompt: Proven sequences for working through all inbox items to OUTCOME_OK including latest invoice lookup and account resolution
Risks including invoice attribution errors, wrong account_id resolution, filename-as-owner-proxy mistakes, unreadable candidates
Queue-specific patterns: account resolution priority (body-named company wins), recipient identity rules (use exact From header)

inbox.description: process/check/handle/review single inbox or inbound note

knowledge_aspects.prompt: Proven step sequences for processing single inbox or inbound notes to OUTCOME_OK
Risks and failure patterns for inbox processing
Inbox-specific insights and optimizations

lookup.description: find, count, or query vault data (contacts, files, channels) with no write action

knowledge_aspects.prompt: Proven step sequences for finding, counting, or querying vault data without writes
Risks: false matches, wrong filters, premature NONE_CLARIFICATION before running list/find/tree
Lookup-specific patterns: search strategies, filter approaches

capture.description: capture explicit snippet/content from source into a specific vault path

knowledge_aspects.prompt: Proven sequences for capturing content from source into vault paths
Risks: wrong target path, partial captures, source misidentification
Capture-specific insights and optimizations

crm.description: reschedule follow-up, reconnect date, fix follow-up regression, date arithmetic + write

knowledge_aspects.prompt: Proven sequences for rescheduling follow-ups, date arithmetic and write operations
Risks: dropped fields on write, wrong field mutation, account_manager overwrite on reschedule
CRM-specific patterns: field preservation (read full record first), date arithmetic, reconnect logic

temporal.description: date-relative queries needing datetime arithmetic (N days ago, in N days, what date)

knowledge_aspects.prompt: Proven sequences for date-relative queries: vault anchor derivation, candidate file inversion approach
Risks: system-clock vs vault-time confusion, wrong temporal anchor, premature NONE_CLARIFICATION before list/find/tree
Temporal patterns: VAULT_DATE as lower bound, ESTIMATED_TODAY derivation, candidate inversion (implied_today = file_date + N)
Proven sequences for analysis/reasoning and writing summary cards or notes
Risks: incomplete analysis, wrong output format, missing required card fields
Distill-specific insights and card-writing patterns
